query:
SELECT 
  u.name,
  u.email,
  sl.digestType,
  sl.sentDate,
  sl.sentAt,
  sl.status,
  sl.itemCount,
  sl.dryRun,
  sl.error
FROM userEmailSendLog sl
JOIN users u ON u.id = sl.userId
WHERE sl.digestType = 'thursday'
ORDER BY sl.sentAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
